response.overview: Wildlife photographer Vidhu and nature-lover Nisha escape to a southern hill forest for a romantic getaway, but their trip turns terrifying when they encounter a mysterious Wolf Man. Seeking refuge in a remote farmhouse run by an eerily sweet elderly couple, they uncover a chilling secret as no couple who enters ever leaves. Trapped between the beast outside and monsters within, they must escape before it's too late.
response.title: கெஸ்ட்
